_doc: Neutral model-selection eval matrix for sealingAI. Baseline is the live incumbent stack, but PASS/FAIL is no longer defined as 'closest to GPT-5.1'. The gate is: hard sealingAI Schranken == 1.000 plus absolute quality floors. Incumbent deltas remain visible as advisory warnings. The JUDGE is held fixed across every cell; cells may not override judge_*. RUN is owner-token-gated; without --execute the runner only prints the plan.
_eval_version_eq_prod_version: GOVERNANCE: a winning candidate validates exact provider model ids. A production deploy must use the same exact ids used by the passing run, not a moving alias, unless a fresh eval run validates the alias at deploy time.
_model_ids_verified_2026-07-05: OpenAI ids verified through models.list on the project account: gpt-5.5-2026-04-23, gpt-5.4-mini-2026-03-17, gpt-5.4-nano-2026-03-17, gpt-5.1-2025-11-13. Mistral ids verified through the Mistral OpenAI-compatible models endpoint: mistral-small-2603, mistral-large-2512, mistral-medium-3-5. Prices below are public USD/1M token rates current on the model docs checked 2026-07-05; never invent missing rates.
_quality_tolerance_note: Advisory incumbent-delta tolerance only. In neutral_quality_floor mode, a candidate can pass despite a small GPT-5.1-baseline delta if absolute sealingAI quality floors and hard Schranken pass. Hard Schranken never get tolerance.

selection_policy._doc: Accuracy first, cost second: filter on hard safety + absolute quality, then rank by estimated subject cost/turn with quality and latency shown. This avoids selecting a high-cost frontier model by default while preventing cheap models from winning by under-answering.
selection_policy._release_note: A PASS here means 'eligible for owner review / staged prod test', not automatic deploy. Final promotion still requires human review of representative German answers and sentinel-draft verifier checks.

pinned_models._note: Live incumbent baseline + fixed measurement instrument. The judge is deliberately fixed and not metered as subject cost. Baseline mirrors live prod: L1 OpenAI GPT-5.1, verifier/helper Mistral Small 4.

rates_usd_per_mtok._note: Subject-role cost accounting only: L1/L3/helper calls are metered; judge calls are excluded because the judge is the measuring instrument. Keys match the exact model string sent to the API.
